allow: Bash(node -e "const lock = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const pkgs = lock.packages || {}; const keys = Object.keys\(pkgs\).filter\(k => k.startsWith\('node_modules/'\)\).slice\(0,5\); keys.forEach\(k => console.log\(k, pkgs[k].version\)\);")

Bash(node -e " const lock = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const pkgs = lock.packages || {}; // Check esbuild - CVE-2025-31125 in <0.25.0, vite uses it // Check if there are any packages that match known CVE version ranges const checks = [ // [package, version, CVE note] ]; // Print all top-level resolved versions for audit const topLevel = Object.keys\(pkgs\).filter\(k => \(k.match\(/^node_modules\\/[^/]+$/\)\)\).sort\(\); topLevel.forEach\(k => { console.log\(pkgs[k].version + ' ' + k.replace\('node_modules/',''\)\); }\); ")

Bash(node -e " const lock = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const pkgs = lock.packages || {}; const topLevel = Object.keys\(pkgs\).filter\(k => \(k.match\(/^node_modules\\/[^/]+$/\)\)\).sort\(\); topLevel.forEach\(k => { console.log\(pkgs[k].version + ' ' + k.replace\('node_modules/',''\)\); }\); ")
